summary: Completed comprehensive testing of x39Matrix Bitcoin 51% Attack Detection Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check API (/api/) returns correct message
Layers API (/api/layers) returns all 9 layers with correct structure
Simulation blocks API (/api/simulation/blocks) returns legitimate chain (5 blocks), attacker chain (6 blocks), and transaction data
Simulation run API (POST /api/simulation/run) saves simulation data correctly
Simulation history API (/api/simulation/history) returns historical data
Dashboard loads with all panels visible (layers, chains, transaction, sentinel, log console, controls)
Start Simulation button triggers complete simulation flow with animations
Block animations appear correctly in both legitimate and attacker chains
L7 Sentinel Alert panel shows attack detection and neutralization
Log console displays real-time events throughout simulation
Reset button clears all state and returns to idle
Phase indicator updates correctly through all simulation phases
Transaction panel shows transaction details and reverted status
